examples.title: Smart Contract Example
examples.description: A simple smart contract that stores a value and allows it to be retrieved.
examples.explanation: This contract has two functions: setValue and getValue. The setValue function sets the value of the contract, and the getValue function returns the current value.

examples.title: Transaction Example
examples.description: A simple transaction that sends Ether from one account to another.
examples.explanation: This transaction has three properties: from, to, and value. The send function transfers the value from the from account to the to account.
